message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_cartesian_prod autograd via per-tensor scatter backward [bd-7ude]

tensor_cartesian_prod used to extract values, build the
all-combinations grid in plain f64, and rebuild a
requires_grad=false leaf — silently severing autograd. PyTorch's
torch.cartesian_prod IS differentiable.

Wrap in tensor_apply_function with per-tensor scatter backward.
Pre-compute the (row, k) → input_index_in_tensor_k odometer
mapping in the outer body; capture it in both closures so the
forward (gather) and backward (scatter) use identical routing
without per-call recomputation. Backward returns
Vec<Option<Vec<f64>>> with one entry per input tensor.

Adds cartesian_prod_propagates_gradient_to_each_input regression
test:
  a = [1, 2], b = [3, 4]
  total_rows = 4, output = [[1,3], [1,4], [2,3], [2,4]]
  Under sum loss:
    grad_a = [2, 2]  (each a entry appears in 2 rows)
    grad_b = [2, 2]  (each b entry appears in 2 rows)

Closes frankentorch-7ude. ft-api lib tests: 1167 passing (+1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
